calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jewell Hargleroad for Edith Feng Kinloch (Objector).

The Court noted that the Petitioner was not present. Ms. Hargleroad stated that Ms. Kinloch may not have standing to a distribution, but that she had standing to request special notice and to object to the Administrator's failure to marshall the out of state assets. In addition, she stated that her Client was looking out for her Mother's and the other Siblings' best interest, and requested that the Court grant the petition as a preliminary distribution. The matter was continued to October 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Hoehler to be present and for further review of the petition.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Upon further review, the Court granted the Petition For Final Distribution (signing the order for the same).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Continued To Jul-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Continued To Sep-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edith Kinloch (Neice) in Pro Per. Marcus Wilson (Petitioner) in Pro Per.

The matter was on the Pre Grant list. Ms. Kinloch stated that she objected to the petition. The matter was continued to February 25, 2008 so that Ms kinloch could file her objection. Mr. Wilson stated that there were assets in China and that the lawyer in China could not act unless an administrator was appointed. The Court took a recess.
The matter was recalled at 10:12 a.m. Ms. Kinloch informed the Court that her mother was still living. The Court informed Ms. Kinloch that she had no standing and affirmed the Pre Grant.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
